# matomo_tagmanager_publish_container_version (Action)

Publishes a Tag Manager container's current draft to an environment. Internally snapshots the draft into a new version, then publishes that snapshot in the same invocation - there is no separate version input, this action always publishes whatever the draft currently holds.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "matomo_tagmanager_publish_container_version" "go_live" {
  config {
    container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.main.id
    environment  = "live"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String) The container's id (matomo_tagmanager_container.x.id).
- `environment` (String) The environment to publish to, e.g. "live". See the matomo_tagmanager_environments data source for valid values on a given instance.
